positive: A majestic, ethereal portrait of a celestial guardian spirit sitting atop floating islands. The figure is draped in flowing nebula silk and surrounded by glowing constellations. Cinematic fantasy illustration, highly detailed digital painting, volumetric lighting, inspired by Art Nouveau and cosmic mythology.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, simple background, bad composition, low contrast
